title: Iran says deal with US ‘not imminent’ despite progress
full_text:
Iran says deal with US ‘not imminent’ despite progress
Iran says deal with US ‘not imminent’ despite progress
Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei says a ‘large portion’ of issues with the US have been resolved, but that a deal is not imminent. He added that there were no guarantees the US would honour the agreement.
Published On 25 May 2026
